flights.tips: Best value for budget travelers; departing from Incheon (ICN) to Narita (NRT).
Departs from Gimpo (GMP) to Haneda (HND), providing the quickest access to central Tokyo.
A high-quality low-cost carrier option with modern Boeing 787 aircraft.
Full-service carrier with complimentary meals and frequent daily schedules.
Ideal for late-night departures; arrives at Haneda (HND) shortly after midnight.

summary: Flights from Seoul to Tokyo are highly frequent, with over 650 weekly departures. Low-cost carriers like Jeju Air and ZIPAIR offer the most affordable fares starting around $60, while premium carriers such as Korean Air and Asiana provide more comfort and better airport proximity (GMP-HND) for around $240-$300.
